title: Better Bare Bones Torches
description: Reverts Bare Bones/Trailers Vision torches texture, while changing Redstone Torch and Copper Torch.
body:
# **A replacement for Bare Bones Torch textures**
That resourcepack is made by Nioum. I find that the old Trailers Vision/Bare Bones torches were better, so I replaced the textures.

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a878121721f35acb126ff78db905ea7d64591736.png)

💙 Reverted Torch, and Soul Torch textures

💙 Created Redstone Torch and Copper Torch textures

![Texture changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e475fd9a7634c6a7fd1f1b2bc1001908182edd13_0.webp)

...That's all, have fun!

I used [ComplementaryShaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) in the screenshots.
